chapter.label: Tale 82
chapter.title: The life of JORN, found to be in the sea. And everybody glorified God.

paragraphs.text: AN ELDER AT THE SKOPELOS MONASTERY | | 84. THE LIFE AND DEATH OF AN ANCHORITE ‘We saw an elder in the same monastery whos name was John, The t OF THE SAME MONASTERY, A SERVANT OF GOD fathers of that place told us: ‘Believe us, Christians, that is a great H one and feared by the demons. Whoever comes here troubled by an 3 The fathers of the same monastery told us this: unclean spirit, that elder provides a care’. i There was an anchorite in these mountains, a great man in the eyes of God who survived for many years on the natural vegetation
